creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> devel/pkg-config

What do you propose to use it for in pkg-config port? I don't see
anything relevant in there.

> sysutils/gkrellm2

Same here, I don't see any files that couldn't be just moved
to /usr/local today.

> lang/mono

Not applicable here, either.

And that's just few ports I checked randomly.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

A)bort, R)etry, H)it with big hammer
